categories.name: Reef & Bottom Fishing
categories.description: Close to shore, relaxed pace — good for beginners, families, or anyone short on time. Snapper, grouper, and reef fish are typical catches.

categories.name: Big Game Trolling
categories.description: Further offshore chasing tuna, wahoo, and sometimes sailfish or marlin — more physically demanding, best for those with some experience.

categories.name: Night Fishing
categories.description: A calmer, social trip close to the reef after dark — popular with groups and often includes a simple onboard meal.
